trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price retests and holds $70,458.20 support or 1h close above EMA20 ($71,253.49)
confluence_signals: Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: A strong confluence of 4h RSI oversold, weak selling volume, and deleveraging (capitulation) suggests a high probability of a bounce from support. The extreme long-short ratio acts as a contrarian signal, often preceding a reversal after a flush out of long positions.

The extreme long-short ratio, while contrarian bearish, often precedes a reversal after a flush out of long positions. This combination points to a high probability bounce from support.

trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Extreme bearish positioning in funding rate historically fuels short squeezes, especially when combined with bullish momentum signals like an expanding MACD. Price being low in its 7d/30d range further supports a contrarian long play.
